rawFiles.name: wikidata-port-modeling-review-2026-07-08.json
rawFiles.notes: Generated by a Wikidata SPARQL query against reviewed Syria port and port-adjacent items in the local data-automation output directory.

transforms: Review port-specific Wikidata items against existing main seaport records.
Hold port-specific duplicates when existing canonical records already combine UN/LOCODE, WPI, GeoNames, and locality identity.
Reject military or naval-base items as out of scope for the default public dataset.
Do not add or replace canonical records until a locality-vs-facility split is designed.
reviewNotes: Reviewed Wikidata port-specific items for Latakia (Q7231180), Baniyas (Q111387304), Tartus (Q111387303), and the already accepted Tartus GeoNames match (Q21591617). No new canonical records were added because the current main seaport records already carry source-backed port identifiers and adding port-specific Wikidata items would require a broader locality-versus-facility modeling split. Rejected Tartus naval base (Q574818) as military/sensitive and out of scope.
